overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a mohawk and plaid shirt walking through a sunny futuristic urban street. The character crosses a busy intersection, walks along a sidewalk lined with palm trees, stops to interact with colorful vending machines, and continues down the street toward a distant highway overpass.

events.description: black truck and green sports car drive through the intersection
character turns left onto the sidewalk after crossing

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk through the busy intersection

notable_agents.action: black truck driving through the intersection
person in white shirt crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: multi-story white building with dark tinted windows and geometric facade
two-story dark blue building with wooden siding and air conditioning units
tall palm trees lining the street ahead
overhead traffic signal structure spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit urban intersection with a wide crosswalk. The character walks across the asphalt crossing as vehicles including a black truck pass through. A white modern building rises on the right while a distinctive blue wooden building stands on the left. Palm trees are visible in the distance under a clear blue sky.

events.description: moving from the open intersection onto the narrower sidewalk
character passes very close to the camera view while walking

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal railings and hedges along the right side of the sidewalk
cluster of colorful vending machines visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a concrete sidewalk running alongside the blue wooden building. Metal fences and hedges line the right side of the path. In the distance, a cluster of colorful vending machines becomes visible. Other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction as the camera follows the character forward.

events.description: approaching the dense cluster of vending machines
character stops at the green vending machine to interact
character purchases an item from the vending machine and picks it up

agents.ego_description: approaching the vending machines and interacting with the green unit to purchase an item

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket using the adjacent pink vending machine

entered.detail: green vending machine with 'BURRITO' signage and yellow warning stripes
pink vending machine with digital drink advertisements
blue and yellow vending machine with snack items displayed

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a dense cluster of colorful vending machines lining the sidewalk. The camera focuses on a green vending machine as the character stops to interact with it. Another person uses an adjacent pink machine. The character retrieves an item from the machine before preparing to move on.

events.description: resuming walking pace after leaving the vending machines
moving away from the vending machine cluster into open sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk away from the vending machines toward the distant overpass

entered.detail: elevated highway structure visible in the distance
large advertising billboards along the street

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the vending machines behind and continues walking along the sidewalk. The metal fence returns to the right side of the frame. In the distance, a highway overpass spans across the view while traffic moves along the multi-lane road. Large commercial billboards become visible on the left side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic city, transitioning from a wide urban intersection to a detailed sidewalk interaction and finally toward a distant highway. It begins with the character crossing a wide asphalt intersection between a modern white building and a blue wooden structure as vehicles pass under a clear blue sky. As the character turns onto the concrete sidewalk, the view shifts to follow them past metal fences and hedges toward a cluster of vibrant vending machines. The camera then tightens its focus as the character stops to interact with a green machine alongside other pedestrians before resuming their walk. Finally, the scene expands as the character leaves the machines behind, moving past large commercial billboards toward a multi-lane road and a spanning highway overpass in the distance.
